We’re bringing back the most loved Burger of the Month specials from 2025, with the legends returning to serve their original creations.

Expect limited quantities, plus 1 special dish curated by the chefs.

The night also features a refined mocktail menu by top bartenders in country, alongside music and a lively atmosphere.

One night only. No repeats.
